name: Gambling Rig
description: Gambling Rig is a dispenser manipulation mod that lets you control dispenser outcomes and decide which side wins. It rigs casino mechanics by turning random rolls into player-controlled results for consistent winning rounds.
usage: Press 'P' to open the Gambling Rig menu and apply your settings.
Rename dispenser items to 1 through 9 before using the mod.

name: Meteor Client
description: Meteor Client is an all-in-one cheat client with combat, movement, render, and automation modules for full in-game control. Now bypassed DonutSMP Anticheat
usage: Enable and customize overlays from the HUD tab (Active + Edit).

name: Krypton Client
description: Krypton+ is an all-in-one powerhouse client designed specifically for DonutSMP. While the base version focuses on performance, Krypton+ expands into a full utility suite featuring advanced combat macros, automated economy tools, and specialized base-finding algorithms.
usage: Enable and customize overlays from the HUD tab (Active + Edit).
